task_completion.description: Open the properties or details window for the 'fells_loop' track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A properties dialog or pane specifically titled 'fells_loop' is open within Garmin BaseCamp.

task_completion.description: Change the display color of the track to Red.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the track properties window, the color dropdown or selector is set to 'Red', or the track line on the map is visibly changed to red.

task_completion.description: Add the required note to the track description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Notes or Description text box in the track properties contains the text 'Priority survey area - invasive species detected along ridgeline'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export process for the modified track.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Export' or 'Save As' file dialog is open, triggered from the Garmin BaseCamp File menu or context menu for the 'fells_loop' track.

task_completion.description: Export the modified track as a GPX file to the specified output path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the file name as 'annotated_track.gpx', the format selected as 'GPS eXchange Format (*.gpx)', and the directory path pointing to 'C:\workspace\output'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Garmin BaseCamp GUI to modify the track.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Garmin BaseCamp menus, properties windows, and dialogs. The agent did not use a text editor (like Notepad or VS Code) to manually edit the GPX XML data.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's built-in export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard Windows 'Export' or 'Save As' dialog triggered by Garmin BaseCamp is visible, rather than terminal commands being used to copy or generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing commands like 'cp', 'mv', or 'echo' being used to create or move 'annotated_track.gpx' into the output directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly 'C:\workspace\output\annotated_track.gpx'. The track color must be set to 'Red'. The description must contain the phrase 'invasive species detected' (specifically 'Priority survey area - invasive species detected along ridgeline'). The track being modified is 'fells_loop'.
